title: Dragons Sword and More 2
description: Dragon Swords and More is a mod for Minecraft that introduces a variety of new weapons, tools, and items to the game. This is my first time making a mod (please send any comments on what to improve on)
body:
Dragon Swords and More is a mod for Minecraft that introduces a variety of new weapons, tools, and items to the game. This is my first time making a mod (please send any comments on what to improve on) One of the main features of the mod is the addition of new swords that are inspired by dragons. These swords are crafted using rare materials and have unique abilities such as fire damage, and increased attack speed. Dragon Swords and More also add new armor sets that provide additional protection and bonuses to the player.

In addition to the dragon-themed weapons and armor, Dragon Swords and More introduces new tools such as pickaxes and shovels that are made from special materials. These tools are more durable and efficient than their vanilla counterparts, making them a valuable addition to any Minecraft player's inventory. The mod also adds new crafting recipes for items that are not available in vanilla Minecraft, such as dragon eggs, dragon bones, and dragon scales. These items can be used to craft new weapons and armor, or they can be used as decorative items for your Minecraft builds. Overall, Dragon Swords and More is a well-designed and popular mod that adds a lot of new content to Minecraft.
